s: In 2008, Cedrick Bowers suited up for COL as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 13.500, WHIP 2.400, SO 5, WAR -0.100.
Changed teams after the previous season (COL -> OAK).
In 2010, Cedrick Bowers suited up for OAK as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 4.500, WHIP 1.290, SO 18, WAR -0.200. Notable context: Joined OAK.
